sketchMechanisms: `del` removes a local name binding; `del self` inside a method does not destroy the object or revoke other references to it.
`NaN` is the only JavaScript value that is not strictly equal to itself, while `Set` uses SameValueZero and treats repeated `NaN` values as one.
A process can send a message to its own PID; the message enters its mailbox and is later received like any other message.
